channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Lionel Messi wins MLS MVP award, the latest trophy on a long list of honors for the Inter Miami star
item.description: FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla. (AP) — It was a rare instance of Lionel Messi stepping on a soccer field and having no idea what was happening. There they were, more than 250 Inter Miami academy players, a slew of kids lined up at midfield in a formation that spelled out three letters: MVP.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Juan Soto could decide on his next team this weekend
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Juan Soto appears on a timetable to decide on where to sign either before or during baseball's winter meetings in Dallas, which start Sunday and run until Dec. 12.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Will Juan Soto top Shohei Ohtani's deal? In the era of deferred money, it might depend on the math
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Deciding whether Juan Soto tops Shohei Ohtani for baseball’s largest contract could be in the eye of the beholder because of all the deferred money in Ohtani's deal.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dosunmu's first career triple-double leads Bulls 139-124 over Spurs
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Nikola Vucevic had a season-high 39 points, Ayo Dosunmu had 27 points, 11 assists and 10 rebounds and the Chicago Bulls beat the San Antonio Spurs 139-124 on Thursday night with Victor Wembanyama sidelined with a back injury.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Is Celebrini on Canada’s Olympic radar? Here’s what their execs said
item.description: NHL: San Jose Sharks rookie could be in mix for spot on Canada's Olympic team for the 2026 Winter Games
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Bay Area News Group boys athlete of the week: Landon Pretre, Menlo School cross country
item.description: Pretre, a senior, finished in 14:38.8 at the CIF meet on Saturday in Fresno, placing second overall to lead Menlo to a Division V championship.
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: NBA returning to China for pair of Suns-Nets preseason games in 2025
item.description: The NBA is returning to China next season, striking a deal to play preseason games there more than five years after the league was effectively banned over Commissioner Adam Silver not punishing Daryl Morey for tweeting support of anti-government protesters in Hong Kong.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lions clinch playoff spot with walk-off field goal in epic high-scoring affair against Packers
item.description: The Lions are back in the playoffs and have won 11 games in a row, this one being in walk-off fashion in a high-scoring affair against the Packers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 2024 CIF Regional Championships: Bakersfield Christian, Frontier play for Southern California title
item.description: BAKERSFIELD, Calif. (KGET) -- Two Kern County schools remain in the high school football season, ready to play in CIF Regional Football Championship Bowl Games.
item.dc:creator: Jose Franco, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utah State expected to hire Bronco Mendenhall
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - It looks like Bronco Mendenhall is coming back to Utah. Utah State is expected to announce the former BYU head coach as its new head football coach as soon as Friday. ESPN reporter Pete Thamel was the first to break the news.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Hagel scores 2, Point has 4 assists in Lightning's 8-1 win over Sharks
item.description: Brayden Point had four assists and Brandon Hagel scored twice to lead the Tampa Bay Lightning to an 8-1 victory against the San Jose Sharks. Jake Guentzel, Conor Geekie and Cam Atkinson each scored a goal and assist. Anthony Cirelli, Nick Perbix and Nicholas Paul scored the Lightning’s other goals.
item.dc:creator: ERIK ERLENDSSON, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Luis Severino and Athletics agree to $67 million, 3-year contract, AP sources say
item.description: Right-hander Luis Severino and the Athletics have agreed to a $67 million, three-year contract, two people familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press. The people spoke on condition of anonymity Thursday because the agreement had not yet been announced by the team.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: California chiropractor defends entering man in women's surf contest to protest transgender athletes
item.description: A California chiropractor who entered a man into a women's surfing contest to protest transgender inclusion defended her stunt amid backlash.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The A's clear the last major hurdle for a $1.75 billion Las Vegas stadium
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — The Las Vegas Stadium Authority approved lease, non-relocation and development documents Thursday to clear the last major hurdles for the Athletics to construct a $1.75 billion stadium on the Strip and bring Major League Baseball to the expanding sports market.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Manny Pacquiao, winner of titles in a record 8 weight classes, elected to Boxing Hall of Fame
item.description: Manny Pacquiao, who won titles in a record eight weight classes from flyweight to super welterweight while becoming one of boxing's biggest draws, was elected Thursday to the International Boxing Hall of Fame.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Former ESPN star Adrian Wojnarowski eyed by Harris campaign to announce Tim Walz VP pick: report
item.description: The Harris campaign reportedly wanted former ESPN star Adrian Wojnarowski to break the news that Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz would be added to the Democratic ticket alongside Harris.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Amber Glenn takes the lead in Grand Prix Final figure skating after Kaori Sakamoto falls
item.description: GRENOBLE, France (AP) — Competing with five Japanese skaters in the six-woman field, Amber Glenn of the United States continued her breakout season in figure skating by taking the lead in the short program at the Grand Prix Final on Thursday as world champion Kaori Sakamoto fell.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Former White Sox player, analyst Bill Melton dies at 79
item.description: CHICAGO — "Beltin'" Bill Melton has died at the age of 79. According to a press release from the team, Melton died early Thursday morning in Phoenix after complications from a brief illness.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Loyd requests trade from Seattle after investigation into Storm shows no bullying, AP Source says
item.description: Jewell Loyd has asked to be traded from Seattle. The six-time WNBA All-Star and two-time Olympic champion requested a trade, according to a person familiar with the situation.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Golden State Valkyries unveil uniforms ahead of inaugural WNBA season
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The Golden State Valkyries won’t take the court for their inaugural 2025 season until May 16, but fans are getting an early look at the WNBA team’s uniforms which were unveiled Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Mense, KRON4

item.title: Aggies win MWC opener over Wyoming, 70-67
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The undefeated streak is still going for the Aggies. Ian Martinez scored 17 of his 23 points in the second half to help Utah State defeat Wyoming 70-67 on Wednesday night at The Spectrum. Mason Falslev's layup with 35 seconds left stretched Utah State's lead to 70-64.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Flagg leads the way as No. 9 Duke holds off Broome and No. 2 Auburn for an 84-78 win
item.description: DURHAM, N.C. (AP) — Freshman sensation Cooper Flagg had 22 points and 11 rebounds to help No. 9 Duke push past No. 2 Auburn 84-78 on Wednesday night in the SEC/ACC Challenge.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: SEC and Big Ten powers lead the way on signing day as prospects finalize their college selections
item.description: The arrival of the early signing period Wednesday offered a stark reminder for college football fans. If recruiting rankings offer any accurate gauge in the era of the transfer portal, those teams competing for College Football Playoff berths now should keep contending for years to come.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Unranked Creighton knocks off No. 1 Kansas behind Pop Isaacs' season-high 27 points
item.description: OMAHA, Neb. (AP) — Pop Isaacs helped unranked Creighton upset No. 1 Kansas 76-63 on Wednesday night, scoring a season-high 27 points and matching his career high with six 3-pointers.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chicago Sky, Angel Reese to open 2025 season against Indiana Fever, Caitlin Clark
item.description: Angel Reese and Caitlin Clark won't have to wait long to renew their rivalry during the next WNBA season.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Jazz come up short against Lakers, 105-104
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Anthony Davis had 33 points and 11 rebounds, LeBron James added 27 points and 14 assists, and the short-handed Los Angeles Lakers beat the Utah Jazz 105-104 on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jaxson Stauber shuts out Vegas in season debut, 6-0
item.description: LAS VEGAS (ABC4 Sports) - Jaxson Stauber made 29 saves for his first NHL shutout, and the Utah Hockey Club defeated the Vegas Golden Knights 6-0 at T-Mobile Arena on Saturday. It was Stauber’s debut for Utah, his seventh NHL game and his first since Feb. 22, 2023, with the Chicago Blackhawks.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
